layout.spacing: Generous Spacing: p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers. Dense grid layout for dashboards (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with strict column spans for widgets.
layout.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use border-collapse logic or 1px solid borders (border-white/10). No soft shadows. For sticky headers, use 'Optical Clarity' glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10).

components.strategy: Shadcn/UI components heavily customized. Flat, rectangular, 1px border. No heavy rounded corners (max rounded-md or 6px).
components.buttons: Flat background. Primary is solid Blue, secondary is transparent with 1px border. Explicit hover states (hover:bg-blue-600 hover:text-white).
components.cards: Cardless or 1px subtle border. No shadow. Hover: slight border color lighten, no translation lift for dense data tables.
components.tables: Dense. Use JetBrains Mono for IPs and Namespaces. Explicit alignment (left for text, right for actions).
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Label, Switch. Inputs have bg-black border-zinc-800. Focus: ring-1 ring-blue-500.
components.badges: For K8s status or Roles. Flat bg with 10% opacity of color, text is 100% opacity of color. e.g., bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400.
components.navigation: Top navigation or side panel with 'Crystal Glass' effect if scrolling, otherwise solid #09090B with bottom border.

motion.transitions: Fast and precise. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for hovers.
motion.interactions: Micro-interactions on row hover (bg-zinc-900/50). Focus rings on all inputs.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark professional tech background for login/landing screen.
Abstract black ribbed texture against dark background for empty states or modal backgrounds.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast is met. Use text-zinc-400 for muted, text-zinc-50 for primary.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have clear focus states (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:outline-none).
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the dark theme and Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast - Dark Tech) palette.
Install and configure 'Cabinet Grotesk', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts or next/font. Use Tailwind font families.
Implement Keycloak authentication structure early to secure the dashboard. Provide role-based views (admin, user, readonly).
Build 'Control Room' grid layout for the Application List.
Use JetBrains Mono for IP allowlist strings and Kubernetes Namespaces to emphasize the developer tool aesthetic.
Configure forms to accept Application Name, Namespace, and an array of IPs for the allowlist. Provide real-time IP validation.
Integrate Shadcn primitives (Table, Dialog, Button, Badge, Switch, Input, Label, DropdownMenu). Overwrite their default border-radius to `rounded-md` (max 6px).
Use the provided `login_bg` as the background image for the authentication/login view with a heavy backdrop blur (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60`).
For empty states in the data table, use the texture_overlay subtly with `opacity-10`.
Add `data-testid` to all actionable components (buttons, links, inputs).
